steps.title: Identify the shared scientific focus
steps.content: The question asks for a similarity between Lawson and Ashcroft. Lawson studied amphibians and reptiles through herpetology, while Ashcroft studied organisms' chemical makeup through biochemistry; both careers centered on living organisms.

steps.title: Reject difference-based choices
steps.content:
• Choice A uses by contrast and emphasizes different research subjects.
  • Choice B discusses scientific fields in general but does not connect the two women through a shared trait.
  • Choice D contrasts their birth years rather than emphasizing a similarity.
The answer is C.
